message:
feat(io): add AsyncSeekExt trait, fix clippy casts, wire up exports (asupersync-2oh2u.2.2)

Add AsyncSeekExt with seek/rewind/stream_position + 4 tests. Fix
cast_possible_wrap and cast_sign_loss clippy lints in ReadI8/WriteI8.
Export all new integer read/write/seek future types from io::ext and
io modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
